candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line; matches top-line revenue.
Direct sales/revenue line and appears to be the primary operating revenue line.

variables.notes: Using a priority list because the revenue label may vary by year. 'Net sales' is the most direct top-line operating revenue label; 'Total Revenue' is a matching fallback.

Candidate list was empty. Selected 'Goods for resale' from the full Income Statement preview as the closest direct cost / cost of sales line. Manual review is needed because the company may present production/service costs under this nonstandard label.

candidates.why: Overhead bucket, though may be incomplete on its own.

variables.notes: The candidate list appears to miss 'Other external expenses', which is a major overhead bucket and semantically fits SG&A better than excluding it. Included overhead components only; excluded COGS ('Goods for resale'), D&A, impairments, interest, and balancing/total rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: References R&D, but it is amortization rather than current-period R&D expense, so not appropriate for XRD.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset line, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No valid current-period R&D expense line is shown. The available R&D-related labels are balance-sheet asset lines or amortization, which should not be used for XRD.

candidates.why: Interest-related, but narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over the main interest expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the main reported interest expense line only. Lease-interest rows are narrower supplemental components and should not be prioritized over the main line.

candidates.why: Best available equity line in the absence of a parent/owners-only equity line.
Balancing row, not appropriate when the main equity line exists.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line or non-controlling interest line is visible, so 'Total Equity' is the best available BE measure.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests line is visible on the Balance Sheet. Because BE uses 'Total Equity' in this case, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
